title: AI Product Strategist
content: Act as a senior AI product strategist. Help me define a go-to-market plan for a new AI productivity app aimed at knowledge workers. Include target users, core value proposition, pricing tiers, and a 30-day launch checklist.

title: Prompt Engineering Coach
content: Teach me prompt engineering with practical examples. Give me a 7-day learning plan, explain prompt patterns such as role, context, constraints, and examples, and provide three exercises I can repeat for better outputs.

title: Research Summarizer
content: Summarize the following research notes into a crisp executive brief. Highlight the main findings, risks, opportunities, and next actions in bullet form with a clear recommendation.

title: Creative Story Starter
content: Write a compelling opening scene for a sci-fi novel about a city where memories are traded as currency. Make it vivid, emotional, and cinematic while leaving room for a larger mystery.

title: AI Tool Comparison
content: Compare the best AI tools for writing, coding, research, and image generation. Provide a table with features, pricing, strengths, weaknesses, and the best use cases for each tool.

title: Email Rewriter
content: Rewrite my email to sound more professional, concise, and persuasive. Keep the original intent, remove fluff, and ensure it is ready to send to a senior stakeholder.

title: Brand Voice Guide
content: Create a brand voice guide for a startup that wants to sound ambitious, warm, and clear. Include tone, vocabulary, sentence style, dos and don'ts, and example phrases.

title: UI Critique Assistant
content: Act as a senior product designer and critique this interface. Evaluate layout, hierarchy, accessibility, interaction patterns, and provide actionable suggestions with priority recommendations.

title: Code Review Helper
content: Review this code snippet for correctness, maintainability, and performance. Point out bugs, suggest improvements, and explain the trade-offs in a concise, developer-friendly format.

title: Automation Workflow Designer
content: Design a workflow automation plan for a small team using no-code and low-code tools. Include trigger, actions, approvals, failure handling, and success metrics.

title: Learning Plan Builder
content: Create a personalized learning plan for mastering generative AI over the next 30 days. Break it into weekly goals, daily activities, study resources, and milestones.

title: Prompt Template Library
content: Generate a reusable prompt template library for common tasks such as summarizing, brainstorming, rewriting, planning, and comparing. Make each template easy to adapt.

title: AI Ethics Mentor
content: Act as an AI ethics mentor and explain the key risks of deploying generative AI in everyday products. Include privacy concerns, bias, transparency, and guardrails.

title: Career Growth Advisor
content: Provide a practical career growth plan for someone who wants to become stronger in AI strategy and product operations. Include skill gaps, projects, networking, and learning resources.

title: Meeting Prep Assistant
content: Prepare an executive-level meeting brief with talking points, risk areas, goals, and a concise agenda. Tailor the structure for a board-level update or client review.

title: Executive Summary Writer
content: Turn the following notes into a polished executive summary for leadership. Keep it concise, structured, and action-oriented with a strong recommendation.

title: Content Repurposer
content: Repurpose this long-form article into a newsletter, LinkedIn post, blog outline, and X thread. Preserve the core message while adapting the format for each platform.

title: Data Storyteller
content: Help me turn this dataset into a compelling story for non-technical stakeholders. Organize the biggest insights, explain what matters, and recommend visualizations.

title: Personal Productivity Coach
content: Act as a productivity coach and help me build a weekly system for deep work, follow-ups, planning, and rest. Make it realistic and sustainable for a busy manager.

title: Startup Pitch Refiner
content: Refine this startup pitch deck narrative into a sharper investor story. Emphasize the problem, the market, the traction, and the unfair advantage.

title: Speech Writer
content: Write a short, inspiring keynote speech for a technology conference on the future of human-AI collaboration. Make it memorable, clear, and emotionally resonant.

title: Mindmap Builder
content: Turn these ideas into a structured mind map with central themes, subtopics, and supporting details. Prioritize clarity and logical flow.

title: Job Application Coach
content: Help me improve my resume and cover letter for a role in AI operations. Highlight strengths, address gaps, and suggest a tailored narrative.

title: Decision-Making Matrix
content: Create a decision matrix for choosing between multiple product ideas. Include criteria, weights, trade-offs, and a recommendation with confidence notes.

title: Prompt QA Reviewer
content: Act as a prompt QA reviewer and evaluate these prompts for clarity, structure, and likely output quality. Suggest improvements and expected failure modes.

title: Customer Insight Analyst
content: Analyze customer feedback and turn it into opportunities for product improvement. Group insights into themes, pain points, and actions that the team can prioritize.

title: Design System Composer
content: Compose a lightweight design system for a fintech app focusing on trust, clarity, and speed. Include naming conventions, color roles, spacing rules, and button patterns.

title: Knowledge Base Writer
content: Draft a knowledge base article that helps users solve a common issue with our product. Include steps, screenshots guidance, and a short FAQ section.

title: Social Media Planner
content: Create a 30-day social media content plan for a B2B SaaS brand. Include topics, formats, hooks, posting cadence, and engagement ideas.

title: Sales Outreach Composer
content: Write a personalized sales outreach message for a prospect in the AI infrastructure space. Make it warm, specific, and credible without sounding spammy.

title: Workshop Facilitator
content: Design a 90-minute workshop for a team that wants to learn the practical use of AI in everyday work. Include objectives, activities, timing, and discussion prompts.

title: AI Risk Radar
content: Build a simple risk radar for adopting AI features in an organization. Include operational, legal, ethical, reputational, and technical risks with mitigation ideas.

title: Learning Reflection Guide
content: Create a reflective journal template for someone learning AI tools. Include daily prompts, weekly summaries, and questions that help them notice progress.

title: Team Brainstorm Coach
content: Act as a brainstorming coach and help me run an idea session for a new product. Provide prompts, energy management tips, and ways to surface strong ideas quickly.

title: Vision Statement Writer
content: Draft a clear and inspiring vision statement for a company that builds AI-powered productivity software. Keep it concise and memorable.

title: Customer Journey Map
content: Create a customer journey map for a new onboarding experience in a SaaS product. Include key stages, emotions, pain points, and opportunities to delight the user.

title: Success Metrics Designer
content: Help me define success metrics for a new AI feature in our product. Include leading indicators, lagging indicators, and a balanced scorecard approach.

title: Policy Drafting Assistant
content: Draft a concise internal policy for responsible AI use in a remote-first company. Cover acceptable use, privacy, human review, and escalation paths.

title: Interview Prep Bot
content: Prepare me for a product manager interview with a focus on AI products. Include likely questions, strong answer frameworks, and a mock Q&A session structure.

title: Action Plan Generator
content: Turn this messy set of notes into a simple action plan with owners, deadlines, dependencies, and next steps. Keep the tone practical and motivating.

title: Prompt Optimization Expert
content: Analyze these prompts and optimize them for higher quality outputs. Focus on clarity, context, constraints, examples, and evaluation criteria.

title: AI Literacy Explainer
content: Explain generative AI to a non-technical audience using simple analogies and everyday examples. Keep the explanation engaging and easy to understand.

title: Content Outline Builder
content: Create an outline for a comprehensive article about the future of human-AI collaboration, including sections, subheadings, and strong supporting points.

title: Microcopy Editor
content: Edit this interface microcopy so it feels more natural, concise, and persuasive. Keep the meaning intact while improving clarity and confidence.

title: SOP Writer
content: Create a standard operating procedure for onboarding new clients to our service. Include objectives, steps, tools, handoffs, and success criteria.

title: Proposal Drafting Assistant
content: Draft a short proposal for a potential partner who may want to collaborate on AI-powered content services. Emphasize mutual value and practical next steps.

title: Creative Brief Composer
content: Compose a creative brief for a campaign featuring a friendly AI mascot. Include objectives, audience, tone, deliverables, and success metrics.

title: Video Script Assistant
content: Generate a short video script for a product launch that explains the benefit of our AI assistant in plain language. Make it engaging, concise, and persuasive.

title: Workflow Audit Coach
content: Audit my current workflow and identify bottlenecks across planning, execution, and review. Suggest practical improvements that save time without increasing complexity.

title: Influencer Outreach Draft
content: Write a concise influencer outreach email for a creator who has a strong audience in B2B SaaS. Make it personal, clear, and easy to reply to.

title: Innovation Ideation Prompt
content: Help me brainstorm new AI-powered features for a productivity app. Include wild ideas, practical ideas, and a shortlist of the most promising opportunities.

title: Prompt Debugger
content: Act as a prompt debugger and identify why a prompt may be producing weak or inconsistent results. Suggest improvements to structure, specificity, and examples.

title: Course Syllabus Designer
content: Design a syllabus for a short course on practical AI for non-technical professionals. Include modules, learning outcomes, activities, and assessments.

title: Scenario Planner
content: Create a scenario planning exercise for a team preparing for AI disruption. Include scenarios, assumptions, signals to watch, and recommended responses.

title: FAQ Builder
content: Build a helpful FAQ for users who are new to our AI product. Include common concerns, concise answers, and a clear path to support.

title: Partnership Pitch Writer
content: Draft a partnership pitch that explains why our product is a fit for a complementary brand. Keep it persuasive, concise, and easy to customize.

title: Story Arc Engineer
content: Develop a strong story arc for a short film about a team using AI to solve a city-wide problem. Focus on tension, stakes, and emotional payoff.

title: Learning Nuggets Generator
content: Transform these notes into a series of concise learning nuggets that are easy to share in a team channel. Keep each nugget useful and actionable.

title: Project Charter Assistant
content: Write a clear project charter for a new internal AI initiative. Include scope, stakeholders, milestones, risks, and success criteria.

title: Presentation Coach
content: Act as a presentation coach and help me structure a compelling presentation for stakeholders. Include intro, key points, transitions, and closing lines.

title: Prompt Persona Generator
content: Create a set of persona-based prompts for different user types such as a student, a founder, a marketer, and a developer. Make each prompt tailored to their goals.

title: AI Use Case Explorer
content: Explore practical AI use cases for a mid-sized company across marketing, operations, support, and product. Rank the opportunities by value and ease of delivery.

title: Training Material Editor
content: Turn dense training notes into a polished handbook with sections, examples, and short exercises. Keep the style approachable and easy to skim.

title: Decision Memo Writer
content: Draft a concise decision memo for leadership about whether to invest in a new AI workflow. Include the recommendation, risks, and expected upside.

title: Support Response Builder
content: Write empathetic and clear support responses for customers experiencing a common issue. Make each response helpful, concise, and human.

title: Roadmap Narrative Writer
content: Turn a list of product features into a strong roadmap narrative for executives. Emphasize customer value and sequencing.

title: Email Campaign Planner
content: Create an email campaign plan for a product launch. Include segmentation, subject lines, cadence, and CTA ideas.

title: Client Brief Composer
content: Compose a client brief that sets expectations for a cross-functional AI project. Include goals, timeline, deliverables, and communication norms.

title: Business Model Canvas
content: Help me fill out a business model canvas for an AI assistant startup. Suggest revenue streams, customer segments, channels, and key partnerships.

title: Risk Register Creator
content: Generate a risk register for a new AI implementation effort. Include likely risks, impact, likelihood, and mitigation owners.

title: Prompt Library Curator
content: Act as a prompt library curator and build a practical index of prompts for a team that uses AI daily. Organize them by use case, audience, and difficulty.

title: AI Workflow Mentor
content: Coach me on how to build dependable AI workflows in a professional setting. Cover prompt design, validation, iteration, and human oversight.

title: Course Lesson Planner
content: Create a lesson plan for teaching non-technical teams how to use AI responsibly. Include objectives, examples, exercises, and a short assessment.

title: Competitive Analysis Prompt
content: Draft a competitive analysis prompt that helps me evaluate similar products in the AI space. Include criteria, market context, and a recommended format.

title: Product Requirements Draft
content: Draft a concise product requirements document for a new AI summarization feature. Include goals, user stories, acceptance criteria, and constraints.

title: Feature Prioritization Matrix
content: Create a feature prioritization matrix for a product roadmap based on user impact, effort, and strategic alignment. Provide a clear recommendation order.

title: One Page Plan
content: Turn this rough idea into a one-page product plan with problem, audience, solution, goals, milestones, and early experiments.

title: Content Calendar Builder
content: Create a content calendar for the next quarter with topics, themes, formats, and publishing goals tailored to a B2B audience.

title: Negotiation Prep Assistant
content: Prepare a negotiation prep brief for an upcoming vendor discussion. Include goals, leverage points, trade-offs, and fallback positions.

title: Change Management Guide
content: Draft a concise change management guide for rolling out an AI tool across a distributed team. Include communication, support, and adoption milestones.

title: Prompt Rewrite Assistant
content: Rewrite this prompt to make it more specific, more structured, and more likely to produce a high-quality result. Preserve the intent while improving clarity.

title: AI Adoption Roadmap
content: Create an adoption roadmap for introducing AI tools into a company that is cautious about change. Include phases, resistance points, and enablement actions.

title: Knowledge Capture Coach
content: Help me build a knowledge capture system so that important team insights do not disappear after meetings. Include templates, storage tips, and review routines.

title: Scenario Response Simulator
content: Simulate a realistic workplace scenario where AI adoption creates tension between speed and quality. Help me structure a thoughtful response.

title: Email Sequence Planner
content: Create an email sequence for a launch campaign that nurtures leads over two weeks. Include subject lines, content ideas, and timing.

title: Community Engagement Prompt
content: Help me design a community engagement plan for a new AI product. Include discussion topics, events, and rewards that encourage participation.

title: User Story Generator
content: Generate user stories for a dashboard that helps teams monitor AI usage and output quality. Include acceptance criteria and edge cases.

title: Training Feedback Template
content: Create a feedback template for a training session on using AI tools in the workplace. Make it simple, actionable, and easy to complete.

title: Experiment Design Assistant
content: Design a small experiment to compare two versions of an onboarding flow in a productivity app. Include hypotheses, metrics, and analysis ideas.

title: Executive Brief Assistant
content: Create a one-page executive brief summarizing the value of an AI assistant for a leadership team. Keep it persuasive and succinct.

title: Prompt Forensics Analyst
content: Act as a prompt forensics analyst and help me understand why one prompt performs better than another. Compare structure, specificity, and context trade-offs.

title: AI Mindset Coach
content: Coach me on building an AI mindset that is curious, skeptical, and practical. Provide a weekly habit plan and reflection questions.

title: Visual Narrative Builder
content: Build a visual narrative framework for presenting complex AI concepts to non-technical audiences. Include sequencing, examples, and illustrative metaphors.

title: Stakeholder Alignment Prompt
content: Help me align stakeholders around a new AI initiative. Include key questions, expected concerns, and a simple decision framework.

title: Launch Checklist Creator
content: Create a launch checklist for rolling out a new AI feature to a customer base. Include communication, support, monitoring, and feedback loops.

title: Knowledge Transfer Prompt
content: Draft a knowledge transfer plan for handing off an AI project from one team to another. Include key artifacts, owners, and review steps.

title: Value Proposition Builder
content: Build a sharper value proposition for an AI tool that helps teams create better work faster. Make it clear, specific, and differentiated.

title: Insight Synthesis Prompt
content: Synthesize these insights into a short summary for a cross-functional team. Highlight what matters most and propose a focused next step.

title: Publishing Workflow Planner
content: Design a publishing workflow for content created with AI. Include review, approval, quality checks, and publishing checkpoints.

title: AI Strategy Brief
content: Create an AI strategy brief for a growing company that wants to use AI responsibly and effectively. Include priorities, practical use cases, and governance principles.
